skitarii_rangers.notes: The cog-priests' skirmishers: a fragile T3 frame with a 4+ save AND a 5+ invulnerable printed on the datasheet — our first invulnerable-save teachers. A fixed ten (one Alpha plus nine); the Alpha's options and the special weapons (arc rifle, plasma caliver, arquebus) are omitted for v1. Skitarii Vanguard (radium carbines, [ANTI-INFANTRY 4+]) are the sibling unit if a second AdMech entry is ever wanted. Profile verified 2026-07-04: 10th-codex-current baseline (Wahapedia) confirmed unchanged by the official 11th-edition Faction Pack errata (June 2026).
